zh.Ystrad, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威爾士卡馬特史爾育斯特拉德
zh.Montgomery, Wales: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Llywelyn ap Cynwrig Efell於大約1165年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利時，他的父親Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl29歲，母親Goleu ferch Gruffudd27歲。他和Goleuddydd ferch Morgan至少有4個兒子。

zh-hans.Montgomery, Wales: 英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llywelyn ap Cynwrig Efell于大约1165年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利时，他的父亲Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl29岁，母亲Goleu ferch Gruffudd27岁。他和Goleuddydd ferch Morgan至少有4个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Efell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Edel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Rudi, Alois, Bernhard, Ernst.
German: from a short form of the ancient Germanic personal name Edilo, formed with Old High German adal ‘tribe, family, nobility’.
German and Dutch: status name or nickname from Middle High German and Middle Dutch edel ‘noble’. See also Edelmann .

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewelyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Llywelyn ap Cynwrig Efell was born about 1165, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl, was 29 and his mother, Goleu ferch Gruffudd, was 27. He had at least 4 sons with Goleuddydd ferch Morgan.

fr.Montgomery, Wales: Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llywelyn ap Cynwrig Efell est né environ 1165, à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Goleu ferch Gruffudd, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Goleuddydd ferch Morgan.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llywelyn ap Cynwrig Efell um 1165 in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl 29 und seine Mutter Goleu ferch Gruffudd 27. Er hatte mit Goleuddydd ferch Morgan mindestens 4 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llywelyn ap Cynwrig Efell è nato il circa 1165 nel Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Goleu ferch Gruffudd, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Goleuddydd ferch Morgan.

ja.lifeSummary: Llywelyn ap Cynwrig Efellが約1165年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーで生まれた時，父Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwyseglは29歳，母Goleu ferch Gruffuddは27歳であった。彼はGoleuddydd ferch Morganとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Llywelyn ap Cynwrig Efell(이)가 대략 1165년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Goleu ferch Gruffudd(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Goleuddydd ferch Morgan(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llywelyn ap Cynwrig Efell nasceu aproximadamente 1165, em Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Goleu ferch Gruffudd, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Goleuddydd ferch Morgan.

ro.Montgomery, Wales: Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llywelyn ap Cynwrig Efell родился около 1165 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Goleu ferch Gruffudd, 27. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Goleuddydd ferch Morgan.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llywelyn ap Cynwrig Efell nació aproximadamente 1165, en Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Cynwrig Efell Lord of Egiwysegl, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Goleu ferch Gruffudd, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Goleuddydd ferch Morgan.
